title: Poki Adventure
description: Cobblmon with more mods on the server
body:
https://discord.gg/Bty8pnWj

Server name:  Poki Adventure

Server ip:    64.87.39.105:25732


🔥 EVERYTHING YOU CAN DO RIGHT NOW:
Core Pokémon Features

All 2025 Pokémon available (Gen 1-9 + DLC) — catch them all!
Shiny & special spawn notifications
Poké Snap — photograph every Pokémon for rewards
Full Pokédex progression with big Dex Rewards

Battles & Challenges

Battle Tower (normal + hard mode)
Pokémon Raids with custom dens & bosses
Rematch every Gen 1 Gym Leader & Elite Four with much stronger teams
Player-run gyms (claim and defend your own gym!)
Daily, Weekly & Monthly battles
Tournaments coming soon

Progression & Badges

Cobbleverse Badges — beat every gym from Gen 1 to Gen 5

Trading & Economy

Wonder Trade
Global Trade System (GTS)
Casino Gacha machines (rare Pokémon & items!)
Custom merchants everywhere

Breeding & Training

Dedicated Breeding Center
Egg donation system
EV Training facility

Daily & Quest Content

Daily Rewards
Research Tasks (hundreds of Pokémon quests)
Cobblemon Hunts & Battle Rewards

Special NPCs

Daily / Weekly / Monthly Battle NPCs
Gym Leader rematch NPCs (Brock, Misty, Lt. Surge, Erika, Koga, Sabrina, Blaine, Giovanni + Elite Four)
Breeding Expert & Egg Expert
Gacha Expert & Wonder Trade Expert
